summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an independent open-PR inventory, instant close and low-signal close are disabled, and fix/merge/raise-pr lanes are blocked. Three non-security seed PRs should stay open for their own review/check lanes. PR #93636 and linked closed PR #74994 are routed to central security handling as exact security-scoped refs; unrelated non-security PR lanes remain classified separately.

actions.reason: Quarantine the exact security-sensitive PR for central OpenClaw security handling. Do not mutate it through Clownfish backlog cleanup.
Keep open as related to #93475. This is a substantive feature PR with supplied proof, not a boring low-signal closeout; advancement needs normal review outside this no-merge/no-fix inventory job.
Keep open as a related focused UI bug-fix PR for #93628. It has plausible narrow scope but pending checks and no completed technical review, so this inventory shard should not close or advance it.
Keep open as related to #87830. The PR is a focused candidate fix, but current checks are not clean and this job is not allowed to merge or repair it.
Quarantine the exact linked security-sensitive PR for central OpenClaw security handling. Do not mutate it through Clownfish backlog cleanup.
